relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains arrears flags (accounts in payment default) while the outbound file contains lending decision overrides (loan application approvals). These represent opposite business processes: one flags problem accounts, the other approves new loans. While both systems are risk_and_compliance-adjacent, there is no plausible data flow where arrears monitoring data would directly generate loan approval overrides. The outbound schema requires loan application details, credit scores, debt-to-income ratios, and approval authority that are not present in the inbound arrears flags schema.
